scripts.start:backend:prod: cd backend && npm run build && pm2 start npm --name augreen-backend -- start
scripts.start:backend:dev: cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.start:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.start: echo "Use 'npm run dev' for development or 'npm run start:backend:prod' on a server with pm2 installed globally."
